mapper.select: SELECT d.document_id AS documentId, d.announce_id AS announceId, d.title AS title, d.description AS description, COALESCE(mdc.status, 0) AS checked, a.announce_title AS announceTitle, a.reqst_end_date AS deadline, COUNT(DISTINCT d2.document_id) AS totalDocs, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mdc2.status = 1 THEN d2.document_id END) AS checkedDocs FROM document d JOIN announce a ON d.announce_id = a.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc ON d.document_id = mdc.document_id AND mdc.member_id = #{memberId} LEFT JOIN document d2 ON d.announce_id = d2.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc2 ON d2.document_id = mdc2.document_id AND mdc2.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE a.announce_id IN ( SELECT announce_id FROM member_favorite WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ) GROUP BY d.document_id, d.announce_id, d.title, d.description, a.announce_title, a.reqst_end_date, mdc.status

SELECT d.document_id AS documentId, d.announce_id AS announceId, d.title AS title, d.description AS description, COALESCE(mdc.status, 0) AS checked, a.announce_title AS announceTitle, a.reqst_end_date AS deadline, COUNT(DISTINCT d2.document_id) AS totalDocs, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN mdc2.status = 1 THEN d2.document_id END) AS checkedDocs FROM document d JOIN announce a ON d.announce_id = a.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc ON d.document_id = mdc.document_id AND mdc.member_id = #{memberId} LEFT JOIN document d2 ON d.announce_id = d2.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc2 ON d2.document_id = mdc2.document_id AND mdc2.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE d.announce_id = #{announceId} GROUP BY d.document_id, d.announce_id, d.title, d.description, a.announce_title, a.reqst_end_date, mdc.status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_document_check (document_id, member_id, status, checked_at, created_at) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{memberId}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), checked_at = NOW()
